scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/qoder-sdk && npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w packages/server && npm run build -w packages/web
scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,web -c blue,green "npm run dev -w packages/server" "npm run dev -w packages/web"
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run build && cp -r packages/web/dist packages/server/public
scripts.publish:all: npm run prepublish && npm publish -w packages/shared && npm publish -w packages/server
scripts.clean: npm run clean -w packages/shared && npm run clean -w packages/server
